tests.name: Tone Separation
tests.input: I need the report by Monday or the project will be delayed.

tests.name: Length Separation
tests.input: Follow up with the client about the contract.

tests.name: Complexity Separation
tests.input: Ask the team to submit project updates by the end of Wednesday for Thursday's planning meeting. Each update must cover completed milestones, blockers with their owner and impact, decisions needing leadership review with options and a recommendation, and priorities for next week. I need the updates early so I can compile the agenda and focus the meeting on unresolved issues.

tests.name: Note Information Only
tests.input: Email my professor asking for an extension.
tests.note: I have a family emergency this week.

tests.name: Note Tone Override
tests.input: Email my professor asking for an extension.
tests.note: Make it more formal than usual.

tests.name: Rewrite Length Stays Same
tests.input: The meeting has been moved to Thursday.
